title: Artifacts in Claude Code: share your work as it happens
summary: Claude Artifacts is a beta feature that transforms raw AI-generated output like data, mockups, and JSON into shareable visual pages. The tool is available on Team and Enterprise plans and helps users communicate results without requiring manual parsing of raw output.
writeup: The video covers Artifacts in Claude Code, a beta feature that converts raw AI-generated output such as data, mockups, and JSON into shareable visual pages. The point is communicating results without manually parsing raw output. Two concrete takeaways: the feature is available on Team and Enterprise plans, and it targets sharing work as it happens rather than after additional formatting.
